summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that MTB is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $211.45. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 8.3%. The asset has recently tested this support 3 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $221.40 and a significant trendline confluence around $218.73 (formed by 13 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
